item.title: Lickspittle of the Week: Todd Blanche 摘要
item.description:
Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche expressed extreme loyalty to President Trump, stating it was 'the greatest honor of a lifetime' to work for him and that he would gratefully accept any reassignment. The article sarcastically suggests Blanche's subservient attitude resembles the phrase 'Thank you sir, may I have another' from a famous scene, implying blind obedience.
标签: politics, Trump administration, loyalty, satire, government, Attorney General, subservience, political commentary, humor, quotes

item.title: Random hexagon fractal 摘要
item.description:
The article describes a method for generating a random fractal using a hexagon. It starts by selecting a random point inside the hexagon, then iteratively picks a random side to form a triangle with that point, updates the point to the triangle's center (e.g., barycenter or incenter), and plots it. Different definitions of 'center' produce distinct fractal images, such as using the centroid versus the incenter, leading to varied visual outcomes. This process relates to chaos games and fractal generation techniques.
标签: fractal, geometry, random, hexagon, triangle, centroid, incenter, chaos game, mathematics, visualization

item.title: The Great Pyramid of Giza and the Speed of Light 摘要
item.description:
A social media post claims the latitude of the Great Pyramid of Giza matches the speed of light. The speed of light is 299,792,458 m/s, and the latitude 29.9792458° N passes through the pyramid, with its center at 29.97917° N. This is a coincidence, as the meter was defined millennia after the pyramid's construction, making any ancient knowledge implausible.
标签: coincidence, pyramid, speed of light, latitude, history, science, measurement, ancient Egypt, fact-checking, social media

item.title: Fewer Computers, Fewer Problems: Going Local With Builds & Deployments 摘要
item.description:
The author describes moving from cloud-based deployment (Netlify) to a local-first approach for personal websites, citing frustration with debugging remote builds. They restructured their notes site to build locally using a clean copy of the codebase, then deploy via Netlify CLI, eliminating reliance on external servers and ensuring builds work reliably on their machine.
标签: devops, web development, local-first, deployment, personal websites, Netlify, build tools, automation, productivity, simplicity

item.title: Writing an LLM from scratch, part 32j -- Interventions: trying to train a better model in the cloud 摘要
item.description:
The author experiments with multiple training interventions on a 163M-parameter GPT-2-style model to reduce test loss from 3.944 to approach the original GPT-2's 3.500. After evaluating interventions like weight tying, weight decay, gradient clipping, QKV bias, dropout removal, and learning rate scheduling, they identify five promising ones: gradient clipping, QKV bias, weight decay adjustment, dropout removal, and learning rate changes. They conduct two training runs—one without QKV bias and one with all five interventions—finding that the run without QKV bias achieves a test loss of 3.577761, the best result so far but still above GPT-2's performance. The analysis highlights interactions between interventions, such as weight decay and learning rate, and considers noise effects.
标签: AI, LLM, training, experiments, GPT-2, machine learning, model optimization, interventions, loss reduction, deep learning

item.title: Adobe Diddles With Your /etc/hosts File 摘要
item.description:
Adobe Creative Cloud modifies users' hosts files to detect if the software is installed when visiting their website. Originally using localhost connections, Adobe switched to a DNS-based method after Chrome blocked local network access. This practice has been criticized as invasive and comparable to malware behavior, with multiple tech commentators expressing concern about Adobe's departure from best practices.
标签: Adobe, Creative Cloud, privacy, security, hosts file, browser, Chrome, malware, software ethics, web development

item.title: GitHub Repo Size 摘要
item.description:
This article introduces a web tool that displays GitHub repository sizes, which aren't shown in GitHub's user interface but are accessible via GitHub's CORS-friendly API. Users can paste a repository name into the tool to view its size, with an example provided for the datasette repository (8.1MB).
标签: GitHub, API, CORS, web-tool, repository, developer-tools, size, datasette, open-source, utility

item.title: MacOS Seemingly Crashes After 49 Days of Uptime — a ‘Feature’ Perhaps Exclusive to Tahoe 摘要
item.description:
A critical bug in macOS Tahoe's XNU kernel causes system freezes after exactly 49 days, 17 hours, 2 minutes, and 47 seconds of continuous uptime. The issue stems from a 32-bit unsigned integer overflow in the TCP timestamp clock, where milliseconds stored in a uint32_t variable overflow. While ICMP (ping) remains functional, most network operations fail, requiring a reboot. The bug appears new to macOS Tahoe, as code analysis shows recent changes in Apple's open-source kernel, and previous macOS versions like Sequoia supported much longer uptimes without issue.
标签: macOS, kernel, bug, TCP, networking, XNU, uptime, integer-overflow, Apple, system-crash
